name: layered-ownership
description: Always-on documentation posture for AI agents in multi-repo systems: each layer records its own decisions, cross-layer references are pointers not ownership, and no repo becomes a central governance hub.

source.title: AI OS Layered Ownership
source.relationship: Authored as a portable baseline pack after a real violation: ecosystem-wide decisions were written into ai-toolkit's roadmap, recreating the frozen governance-hub pattern the operator had just dismantled (2026-07-03).
